title: Utapaun (disambiguation)
content:
==[[Canon]]==
[[File:Utapauns-SWBC68.png|thumb|right|250px|Pau'ans (left) and Utai (right) were collectively called Utapauns.]]
'''Utapaun''' was a collective term to refer to two separate indigenous [[species]] on the [[planet]] of [[Utapau]]:
*The languid [[Pau'an]]s, who served as the modest patrician class on the planet
*The short [[Utai]], who served as the labor class and were humble by their nature

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
There were two distinct species of '''Utapaun''' on the planet [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]:
*The short, stocky [[Utai/Legends|Utai]], who developed deep within Utapau's sinkholes
*The tall, gaunt [[Pau'an/Legends|Pau'ans]], who developed on the planetary surface but later moved into the sinkholes as well.

{{Disambig}}
{{Interlang
|ja=ウータパウン
}}
